label: Find patterns
text: Find the patterns across these videos. What advice do all of them agree on? Where do they disagree? Cite the specific video and timestamp for each claim.

label: Pull tactics
text: Pull out every concrete tactic mentioned across these videos. Group them by theme. For each tactic, cite which video it came from.

label: Summarize + synthesize
text: Summarize each video in 2 sentences, then write one synthesis paragraph that ties them together — what is the larger picture this set of videos reveals?
